tools.name: scan_brand_visibility
tools.description: Run a full AI visibility scan across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & Perplexity. Returns mention rates, rankings, and sentiment. Scan runs in background.

tools.name: check_visibility_score
tools.description: Get current GEO and AEO visibility scores with per-model breakdown, mention count, and sentiment analysis.

tools.name: analyze_website_geo
tools.description: Analyze a website's GEO readiness — checks robots.txt for AI crawlers, schema markup, and content structure.

tools.name: get_geo_recommendations
tools.description: Get prioritized action items and recommendations with estimated impact scores to improve AI visibility.

domain.description: The domain to get recommendations for (e.g. 'example.com').

tools.name: compare_competitors
tools.description: Compare your brand's AI visibility against tracked competitors across all major LLMs.

tools.name: get_scan_history
tools.description: Get historical scan data and score trends over time for a domain.

domain.description: The domain to get history for (e.g. 'example.com').

tools.name: get_tracked_prompts
tools.description: Get the list of AI search prompts currently tracked and tested for a domain.

domain.description: The domain to get prompts for (e.g. 'example.com').

prompts.name: geo_audit
prompts.description: Run a complete GEO audit for a domain.

prompts.name: competitor_analysis
prompts.description: Run a competitive AI visibility analysis.

prompts.name: content_optimization
prompts.description: Analyze content for AI visibility optimization.
